name: Developer
description: Developer tools, environment management, service diagnostics, and advanced system configuration.

settings.label: Context Debug
settings.description: Inspect live normalized context, sensor source, and resolved adaptive actions

settings.label: Context Runtime State
settings.description: Inspect context service status, sensor source summary, and resolved runtime actions

settings.label: Context Raw JSON
settings.description: Inspect full normalized context payload for debugging and integration checks

settings.label: Environment Variables
settings.description: Manage session, user, and system environment variables

settings.label: PATH Manager
settings.description: Manage executable search paths with validation, preview, and command resolution

settings.label: Per-App Environment Overrides
settings.description: Override environment variables for specific applications

settings.label: Logs & Events
settings.description: Aggregated log stream from shell components

settings.label: Process & Services
settings.description: Monitor and control shell service components

settings.label: Build & Runtime Info
settings.description: Qt version, compiler, session type, and system information

settings.label: Reset & Recovery
settings.description: Reset session environment, restart components, and recover from bad state
